description: A high-impact dark template built around bold uppercase typography and sharp cardinal accents. Castro commands attention from the first slide — ideal for pitches, launches, and data-driven storytelling.

visual_style.density: moderate-high — content is chunky, not verbose
visual_style.color_weight: dark dominant with cardinal accent pops
visual_style.imagery_style: high-contrast photography, simple geometric icons; full-bleed images work well

best_used_for: Sales pitch decks and fundraising presentations
avoid_for: Academic or formal institutional contexts (use Sunset)
Delicate or editorial visual storytelling (use Noe)
Presentations requiring light or neutral backgrounds for heavy charts

font_requirements.note: Source Sans 3 is used for all display and body text; Roboto is the fallback.

asset_placeholders.logo_light: Bottom-left, max 120×40px. Must be white or light-colored — dark logos will be invisible on the dark master.
asset_placeholders.logo_dark: Bottom-left, max 120×40px. White version for the cardinal section divider master.
asset_placeholders.hero_image: Full-bleed photography for image_full_bleed layout. Minimum 1920×1080px. High-contrast images work best — scrim overlay will darken by 60%.

accessibility.note: Muted text (#8A8A8A on #0D0D0D) achieves approximately 4.6:1 contrast — use for non-essential text only. Body text should use #CCCCCC or lighter.
